vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with assembling intricate Lego structures.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không biết chán
vocab.example: My insatiable curiosity about the natural world drove me to collect various insect specimens as a hobby.

vocab.meaning: kỳ quặc, đầy tính tưởng tượng/ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: I used to write whimsical stories about talking animals in a tattered notebook I kept under my bed.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Building model airplanes helped me develop excellent spatial awareness from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: thong thả dành thời gian làm gì đó
vocab.example: I would often idle away the hours by the river, sketching the willow trees in my sketchbook.
Unlike my brother, who stuck to one craft, I had many fleeting interests ranging from origami to coin collecting.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo (đặc biệt là bàn tay)
vocab.example: Learning to play the flute as a child required a great deal of finger dexterity and patience.

vocab.meaning: chỉ đơn thuần vì mục đích gì đó (thường là niềm vui)
vocab.example: I played football purely for the sake of enjoyment, rather than for any competitive glory.

vocab.meaning: phương thức giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: Painting served as a vital creative outlet for me during the stressful periods of primary school.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng/nhớ lại một cách hạnh phúc
vocab.example: I often reminisce about the traditional board games I used to play with my grandparents every weekend.
